atm_cash.title: Find an ATM
atm_cash.footer: The machine's fee stacks on your card's costs — the ranking above models ฿220. Whatever the machine, always decline the on-screen USD conversion (DCC).

entries.name: AEON
entries.note: Cheapest machine fee in Thailand. Dispenses up to ฿20,000 a pull. Maps opens their Exchange Tower flagship (BTS Asok).
entries.mapsQuery: AEON Thana Sinsap 388 Sukhumvit Road Bangkok

entries.name: Krungsri (yellow)
entries.note: Dispenses up to ฿30,000 a pull — fewer fees on big withdrawals.

entries.name: Bangkok Bank (blue)
entries.note: Up to ฿25,000 a pull. Maps opens the Silom head office.

entries.name: Kasikorn (green)
entries.note: Raised its foreign-card fee to ฿250 in 2025.

booths.name: SuperRich Thailand
booths.areas: 45 Soi Ratchadamri 1 HQ · counters at major BTS stops
booths.note: The benchmark board. Big, clean $100 notes get the top rate.

booths.name: Siam Exchange
booths.areas: 422/3 Phaya Thai Rd · BTS National Stadium
booths.mapsQuery: Siam Exchange 422/3 Phaya Thai Road Pathum Wan Bangkok

booths.name: K79 Exchange
booths.mapsQuery: K79 Money Exchange 2063 Sukhumvit Road On Nut Bangkok

booths.name: Airport & bank counters
booths.note: Convenience is priced in — typically 1.5–3% worse than the chains above.

legs.label: Exchange booth
legs.notes: Reputable booths charge no commission — the rate is the whole story. Large, clean $100 notes get the best rate.

legs.label: Schwab debit · ATM
legs.subgroupNote: Same machine, different card — the card decides the cost. Thai ATMs charge ฿220–250 a pull (modeled at ฿220); AEON machines only ฿150.
legs.notes: Schwab Investor Checking: no foreign-transaction fee, and every ATM fee — including the Thai ฿220 — is rebated at month-end. You get Visa's wholesale rate, on average ~0.3% off mid. Needs the free brokerage + checking account opened before your trip.

legs.label: Wise card · ATM
legs.subgroupNote: Same machine, different card — the card decides the cost. Thai ATMs charge ฿220–250 a pull (modeled at ฿220); AEON machines only ฿150.
legs.notes: Wise's published US schedule: 0.57% USD→THB conversion, $250/month of fee-free ATM withdrawals, then $1.95 + 1.95% per withdrawal.

legs.label: Revolut card · ATM
legs.subgroupNote: Same machine, different card — the card decides the cost. Thai ATMs charge ฿220–250 a pull (modeled at ฿220); AEON machines only ฿150.
legs.notes: Revolut US Standard: 2% fee on every out-of-network ATM withdrawal (all Thai ATMs are). Exchanging over $1,000/month adds a 0.5% fair-usage fee, and converting outside market hours (Fri 5pm–Sun 6pm ET) adds 1% — convert before the weekend.

legs.label: Your debit card · ATM
legs.subgroupNote: Same machine, different card — the card decides the cost. Thai ATMs charge ฿220–250 a pull (modeled at ฿220); AEON machines only ฿150.
legs.notes: Modeled on your own bank's fees — set your foreign-transaction fee and ATM fee in Setup to make this exact.

legs.label: Your credit card · ATM
legs.subgroupNote: Same machine, different card — the card decides the cost. Thai ATMs charge ฿220–250 a pull (modeled at ฿220); AEON machines only ฿150.
legs.acceptanceNote: Amex / Discover often rejected at Thai ATMs
legs.notes: Withdrawing cash with a credit card is a cash advance: most issuers charge 5% (min $10) plus ~30% APR from day one — no grace period. Modeled assuming you pay it off in 30 days; set your card's actual fee in Setup.

legs.label: Wise
legs.notes: Converts at the mid-market rate; the cost is the upfront fee (~0.45% + $0.80, ACH-funded). Debit funding adds 1%, credit 3%. Rate verified against a live comparison 2026-06-11.

legs.label: Remitly
legs.notes: Economy bank deposit, no fee at this size. The margin moves with promotions — measured ~0.4% on 2026-06-11; express speed or card funding costs more.

legs.label: Revolut
legs.notes: Revolut US: 0.15% transfer fee (min $0.75). Their THB rate carried a ~0.5% spread when measured 2026-06-11 (majors are tighter). Exchanging over $1,000/month adds 0.5%, and converting outside market hours (Fri 5pm–Sun 6pm ET) adds 1%.

legs.label: Xe
legs.notes: No transfer fee over $500 ($3 under). The cost is the rate margin — measured ~1.0% USD→THB on 2026-06-11; Xe's markup varies 0.5–2%.

legs.label: OFX
legs.notes: No transfer fee, $150 minimum. Retail margin typically 1–2% on exotics and improves a lot on large transfers — built for big moves; get their live quote above ~$10k.
